# @platform/search-runtime

DEPRECATED (ADR-0006 / ADR-ACT-0288): superseded by apps/platform-api usecases/search.ts + adapters/postgres-search-repository.ts; do not add new usage; removal review 2026-12-18. Search service abstraction: query interface, index management contracts, and search provider interface.

> **⚠️ DEPRECATED — do not add new consumers.** Retained only until its removal review (ADR-0006); new imports are blocked by the `no-import-from-deprecated` boundary rule. See **Public exports and usage** for the canonical replacement.

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: deprecation-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: deprecated
```

## Responsibilities

- Define the typed search query interface (full-text, filtered, faceted)
- Declare index management contracts (create, update, delete documents)
- Specify search provider interface that concrete adapters must implement
- Decouple feature packages from specific search engine SDKs

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement search index backends (owned by concrete adapters such as OpenSearch or Typesense)
- Does not define what data is indexed (owned by feature and domain packages)
- Does not own search ranking or relevance configuration

- Search is eventually consistent with the transactional store ? document freshness depends on indexing lag
